name: Arizer Glass Whip Mouthpiece
summary: Arizer Glass Whip Mouthpiece — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: Crafted from durable Borosilicate Glass, the Glass Whip Mouthpiece for Arizer XQ2, Extreme Q, and V-Tower vaporiser, is specifically designed for use with the Whip System. It is compatible with the 3' Whip Hose/Tubing (9 feet) included with the Arizer XQ2, Extreme Q, and V-Tower vaporiser, making it a versatile and reliable choice. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer and our own experience testing the product. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
